News

News, publications, and opportunities

Recent updates from Yoon Lab. Edit _data/news.yml to add new items.

Publication

Paper accepted in Applied Catalysis B: Environment and Energy

Our work on facet-resolved mechanisms for OER-selective seawater electrolysis on Co₃O₄ has been accepted.

2026-01-15
Publication

Paper published in Advanced Functional Materials

Our work on copper corrosion in Li₆PS₅Cl-based all-solid-state batteries has been published.

2025-05-10
Recruiting

Open positions for MS, PhD, and combined MS–PhD students

Students interested in batteries, electrochemical diagnostics, corrosion, solid-state electrolytes, and polymer electrolytes are encouraged to contact us.

2025-04-30
Publication

Paper published in Chemical Engineering Journal

Our work on aqueous supercapacitors with ultrawide potential window and pH-independent stability has been published.

2025-02-20

YOON LAB

Electrochemical Engineering Lab

Quantitative electrochemical diagnostics for interfaces, degradation, and corrosion.
